title: Eclipsed: Dark Fantasy & Magic
description: Plunged into eternal night, the world is flooded with evil and chaos, it is up to you to save it...
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e02afbe2c5c89ede52da4c3f7ae9c47fae161ee.gif)
# UNFOLD: Eclipsed
Eclipsed is a modpack centered around darkness, magic, chaos, and monsters. The world has been plunged into an endless eclipse, blocking out the sun and letting monsters thrive throughout the world...

**Your ultimate quest is to craft The Umbra, a trophy item that is the culmination of your entire journey.**


# Eternal Night
Enjoy the bright daylight? Too bad, with the endless eclipse blocking the sun, the day has become dim and uninviting; however, it has also become extended and longer...at the cost of the night becoming much, much, MUCH darker...
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28ad453311b00d0dd7fde9985a1be26e00aec6c8.png)

![Unfoldtitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72eaec945eaa26930f19d8af3106feb0bdd8289a.png)

To use with shaders: If you want to use shaders, do so at your own risk. It is STONGLY recommended to change shader settings to make a light level of 0 appear pitch black.
